reasoning: Multiple credible sources (including Al Jazeera, Reuters, AFP, and France 24 published on June 4, 2025) report that the Independent Electoral Commission (CEI) of Ivory Coast published the electoral list on June 4, 2025, which confirmed the definitive exclusion of four prominent opposition figures. Former President Laurent Gbagbo is explicitly named as one of the figures excluded from the list due to prior legal convictions. He is one of the candidates explicitly listed in the resolution criteria. The exclusion occurred on June 4, 2025, which is before the July 1, 2025 deadline. Therefore, the conditions for a "Yes" resolution are fully met.
